name: Mushroom Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, melt the butter.
2. Add the onion flakes, bell pepper flakes, and dried mushrooms to the melted butter.
3. Stir over moderate heat for a few minutes until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Pour the mixture evenly over the popped corn.
5. Sprinkle salt over the popcorn.
